**Formatting strike information in JSON**

I need to structure the relevant details regarding the upcoming national strike in Italy into JSON format. The text mentions a general strike planned for "Domani," with transport services halted from 9 AM to 1 PM in Rome. It also notes the reduced strike duration due to an ordinance. The publication date is 28/11/2024. So, I’ll include fields for "isStrike" and "strikeData" with this timing and context in mind.
